data.content: Made Shift+R and Cmd/Ctrl+Shift+R repo cycling global to all app screens by removing beats-route gating in AppHeader, using a capture-phase keydown listener, and keeping wraparound behavior via cycleRepoPath. Updated beats page layout guard test to assert global binding and capture listener. Quality gates in isolated worktree: bun run lint (warnings only), bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test (1962 passed), NODE_ENV=production bun run build all pass.
